title: Arozzi Arena Nordico Electric Standing Desk review: minimalist design with maximum appeal, but key accessories cost extra
summary: The Arozzi Arena Nordico electric standing desk hails from Sweden and is suitably minimalist in every way, from its clean and simple look to its easy assembly and clever cable tidy setup.
